<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Payloads; use Spatie\Backtrace\Frame; use Spatie\Ray\Concerns\RemovesRayFrames; class CallerPayload extends Payload { use RemovesRayFrames; /** @var array */ protected $frames; public function __construct(array $frames) { $this->frames = $this->removeRayFrames($frames); } public function getType(): string { return 'caller'; } public function getContent(): array { $frames = array_slice($this->frames, 1, 1); /** @var Frame $frame */ $frame = array_values($frames)[0]; return [ 'frame' => [ 'file_name' => $this->replaceRemotePathWithLocalPath($frame->file), 'line_number' => $frame->lineNumber, 'class' => $frame->class, 'method' => $frame->method, 'vendor_frame' => ! $frame->applicationFrame, ], ]; } }
